_comment: MythicCord Pterodactyl egg. Import via Admin > Nests > Import Egg. The proxy ships with a runnable standalone build that connects to mythic-stdb without serving Minecraft traffic; flip the WITH_INFRARUST variable on once the upstream subtree is vendored.
name: MythicCord
author: ops@mythicpvp.net
description: MythicCord — Rust Minecraft proxy (Infrarust fork) wired to mythic-stdb. Manages routing, sessions, registry heartbeats, and Pterodactyl-friendly graceful shutdown.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
set -eu
apk add --no-cache curl tar ca-certificates

cd /mnt/server

VERSION="${MYTHICCORD_VERSION:-latest}"
ARCH=$(uname -m)
case "$ARCH" in
  x86_64) TARGET="x86_64-unknown-linux-musl" ;;
  aarch64) TARGET="aarch64-unknown-linux-musl" ;;
  *) echo "unsupported arch: $ARCH" >&2; exit 1 ;;
esac

if [ "$VERSION" = "latest" ]; then
  URL="https://github.com/mythicpvp/mythic-cord/releases/latest/download/mythiccord-${TARGET}.tar.gz"
else
  URL="https://github.com/mythicpvp/mythic-cord/releases/download/${VERSION}/mythiccord-${TARGET}.tar.gz"
fi

echo "[install] downloading ${URL}"
curl -fsSL "$URL" | tar -xz
chmod +x ./mythiccord

if [ ! -f ./mythiccord.toml ]; then
  cat > ./mythiccord.toml <<'TOML'
[stdb]
uri = "http://spacetimedb:3000"
module = "mythicpvp"

[identity]
shard_id = "proxy-1"
role = "HUB"
region = "us-east"
address = "127.0.0.1:25565"
max_players = 500

[admin]
bind = "0.0.0.0:8080"

[log]
format = "json"
filter = "info,mythiccord=debug"

[config_export]
servers_dir = "servers"
TOML
  echo "[install] wrote default mythiccord.toml"
fi

if [ ! -f ./infrarust.toml ]; then
  cat > ./infrarust.toml <<'TOML'
bind = "0.0.0.0:25565"
servers_dir = "servers"
TOML
  echo "[install] wrote default infrarust.toml"
fi

echo "[install] done"

variables.name: MythicCord version
variables.description: Release tag to install. 'latest' tracks the most recent GitHub release.

variables.name: SpacetimeDB URI
variables.description: Base URL for the SpacetimeDB host. http(s) — protocol is rewritten to ws(s) internally.

variables.name: SpacetimeDB module
variables.description: Published module name. Must match `spacetime publish <module>`.

variables.name: Shard ID
variables.description: Globally-unique id for THIS proxy instance (e.g. proxy-us-1).

variables.name: Role
variables.description: What kind of traffic this proxy serves. One of HUB, SKYBLOCK, PVP, EVENT.

variables.name: Region
variables.description: Geo-routing tag. Players in matching regions are preferred at routing time.

variables.name: Public address
variables.description: host:port other proxies/backends would dial to reach this proxy.

variables.name: Max players
variables.description: Soft cap reported to the registry. Routing avoids proxies at capacity.

variables.name: Log filter
variables.description: tracing-subscriber EnvFilter directive. Default is sensible.
